default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off engagement between Alex AI and GrowthX to accelerate marketing efforts and establish market leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Alex AI aims to shift from 90% staffing firms to 40-60% direct employers within 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Current marketing is minimal; goal is to become top result for "AI recruiter" searches](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on high-intent content initially, scaling up as signals improve](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Accelerated timeline requested: publish first content piece by week 3, daily cadence by week 4](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview and Product

  - [Alex AI (formerly Apriora) offers an AI recruiting assistant](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Product automates 80-90% of recruiter tasks (emailing, texting, voicemails, scheduling, resume screens)](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Differentiators: workflow automation, end-to-end solution, strong enterprise support](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)

### Target Audience and ICP

  - [Staffing firms: 10+ recruiters, VP/Director of Operations, CEO, COO](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Direct employers: Fortune 500/1000, CHROs, VPs of Talent, Directors of Talent Acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Geographic focus: Primarily US, some presence in North America and Europe](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### Current Marketing Efforts

  - [Main channels: conferences, outbound (email, cold calling), word-of-mouth](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
  - [Limited inbound marketing; \~1-2% of SQLs from inbound](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=2255.0)
  - [Team: 20 people total, 5 engineers, 2 handling marketing, 1 interim SDR lead, 2 SDRs](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Direct competitors: HireVue (one-way interviewing)](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Adjacent competitors: Eightfold, Paradox](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Incumbents offering similar features: Bullhorn Amplify, Bullhorn Sense](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=2121.0)

### Growth Goals and Challenges

  - [Increase unqualified leads (MQLs) to build brand equity](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Shift from 90-10 staffing firms vs. direct employers to 40-60 split](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Become top search result for "AI recruiter" in both Google and ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=3002.0)
  - [Increase inbound SQLs from \~1-2% to 50% of total leads](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=3108.0)

### Website and Branding

  - [Recent rebrand from Apriora to Alex AI](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [New website launch in \~2 weeks with updated branding (more natural, physical elements)](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Using Webflow CMS for website management](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=3545.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on high-intent, easier-to-rank content initially](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Build up to more comprehensive coverage as domain authority increases](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=3505.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic plays (e.g., interview guides for specific companies)](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=2519.0)

## Next Steps

  - Alex AI to send sales call recordings, product demos, and branding materials to <team@growthxlabs.com>
  - [Alex AI to grant GrowthX access to Search Console, Google Analytics, and Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=3638.0)
  - [GrowthX to review materials and develop initial content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=3467.0)
  - [Aim to publish first content piece by week 3, with daily publishing cadence by week 4](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=3473.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up deep dives on product demos and specific areas as needed](https://fathom.video/share/2z7rsaJGHYfyHHR-Ga_T4LBXK6mwtTHP?tab=summary&timestamp=3346.0)
